text.title: django-quality-logging Output Contract
text.summary: The methodology produces a Markdown audit report. The frontmatter of that report must validate against the JSON Schema below.
text.reference: Validator script — exit 0 on pass, 1 on violation list.

section.title: JSON Schema (frontmatter of the audit report)

example.code: --- methodology: django-quality-logging target_repo: faionfaion/faion-net django_version: "5.2" python_version: "3.12" structlog_status: installed: true middleware_registered: true json_renderer: true issues: [] sentry_status: dsn_present: true traces_sample_rate: 0.1 send_default_pii: false before_send_present: true check_deploy_verdict: pass findings: [] ---
example.note: Valid: every required key present, traces_sample_rate within [0,1], no findings.

example.code: --- methodology: django-quality-logging target_repo: faion-net django_version: "5.2" python_version: "3.12" structlog_status: installed: true sentry_status: dsn_present: false traces_sample_rate: 1.0 check_deploy_verdict: error findings: - severity: error fix: install structlog ---
example.note: Invalid: structlog_status missing middleware_registered/json_renderer/issues; sentry traces_sample_rate=1.0 violates rule r2-sentry; finding missing rule_id/file/line.
